summary: Lead accepts SIM-005 after independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT and lead integration gates. Save Envelope v1 is implemented as an explicit DTO/codec in @monsoon/save-format, sim-core supports structured save/load rejection without mutating current runtime, Node and Worker save/load canaries share the same core codec, golden fixtures and malformed-save tests cover the M1 contract, and the 3650-day M1 fixture performance baseline is recorded.

tests_run.result: Scope all 16 workspace projects; lockfile install already up to date.
6 test files passed; 32 tests passed; existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Node/Worker hello hash 61e0ba1c matched; command/query hash d275faa4 matched; save/load hash 28074edd matched; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
M1 30-node fixture ran 3650 days; throughput 15207 days/sec; p50 55900ns; p95 98500ns; p99 168100ns; saveByteLength 9980; save 1883600ns; load 2516700ns.
Recursive workspace typecheck passed for 15 of 16 workspace projects.
All matched files use Prettier code style.
Architecture check and determinism passed; root Vitest 13 files/53 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
m1.abstract-graph-30 validation passed with nodes=30, edges=60, manifestHash=4a438525.
SIM-005 listed as REVIEW before lead acceptance; all prior M1 tasks CLOSED.
No dependency-ready task listed while SIM-005 remained under review.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff for all SIM-005 writer/reviewer handoffs
tests_run.result: Initial writer handoff, two QA REQUEST_CHANGES handoffs, two writer fix handoffs, and QA ACCEPT handoff all validate.
All SIM-005 route files parse, referenced handoffs exist, send_input route records have exit_code 0, and duplicateThreadIds is empty.

tests_run.command: lead QA repro command for valid-checksum eventTail unknown kind and schemaVersion 999
tests_run.result: Both cases returned status rejected, preserved original runtime hash a38362fd, and reported invalid-schema paths body.eventTail[0].event.kind and body.eventTail[0].event.schemaVersion.

decisions: SIM-005 remains ACCEPTED, not CLOSED, until its implementation PR is merged into main.
Accepted v1-only saved DomainEvent tails for M1: future or corrupted event-tail DTOs are rejected with structured invalid-schema reasons unless a future task adds explicit migration.
Accepted @monsoon/save-format as a pure DTO/codec package with no platform persistence, IndexedDB, Electron filesystem adapter, compression, database, or external production dependency.
Closed simulation_engineer thread 019ef8ea-061c-7763-b063-86130c02a48f and qa_reviewer thread 019ef8ff-1fe3-72d1-bf3c-fc44b3a8af37 after QA ACCEPT and lead acceptance.
risks: Save/Event compatibility beyond v1 remains future work and must include explicit migration or rejection tests.
The event tail is a bounded M1 compatibility/debug tail, not full event sourcing.
requested_action: Commit SIM-005, open a PR, wait for checks, merge after green, then mark SIM-005 CLOSED only after the merge reaches main.
